{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323031554E5D4CD618EC39DC3EE00\"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405978399156011801","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"奇妙的经历，新颖的构思，不是日常，胜似日常。以少年青春为题，写奇妙冒险。以轻狂中二为字，谱华章一曲。\n有轻狂的少年，中二的少年，欢乐的少年，团结的少年，睿智的少年。是青春的岁月，是青春的气息。\n文体流畅，结构紧凑，逻辑和理，情感丰富，思维活跃。强烈推荐，值得一观。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724341474,"group_id":"7384811950997261336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"诸天之内我为尊，万界之外奉为神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5WLDoTKMk61BBQ1tuACHxOAnz6TxJyoU21qObtg4CP4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5b7ddf3a68904e34b8193a7c0ea06e8e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792307\u0026x-signature=gzXRtrr%2FgC6zHcdux8cjJLoj84A%3D","user_id":"2475691323954248","user_name":"风华冠诸天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2475691323954248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755360876,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7384811950997261336","book_info":{"abstract":"打脸小说看多了，本文主打一个反向打脸。男主叫叶辰，没有任何超自然的异能，唯一特殊的是名字像爽文男主。身边的朋友又恰巧都被爽文洗脑了，以为他真是爽文男主。于是纷纷猜测他是不是修仙者、是不是仙帝转世、是不是穿越者、是不是霸道总裁。他怎么解释都没用，身边的人总是深信不疑。这个名字也让他多了一群追随者，于是现实世界演出一幕幕没有金手指胜似金手指的神奇经历。将普通的人生过成了比任何爽文还爽的真的爽文。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2occ0fc1c56b4769db97b929745ed41acd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"比人才更二","author_id":"","book_id":"7384811950997261336","book_name":"我有个爽文男主的名字","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":871,\"name\":\"第一人称\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871\u0026name=第一人称\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7384816392312193560","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"252790"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"102","tags":"都市日常,都市,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2occ0fc1c56b4769db97b929745ed41acd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779390955\u0026x-signature=z9jmtdqbk01M%2BU6Qn8Wym1W0j9Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52383019595","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323031554E5D4CD618EC39DC3EE00\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r
